quiz.question:
White recaptured on d3. 

White's king is still uncastled, so Black can go for ...Qe7+ to disrupt their coordination. 

Should Black go for it?

answers.text: No, it is not safe. Black's king is also still in the center.

feedback.text: Exactly, after ...Qe7+, White just moves the king and Re1 pin is threatened.

distractors.text: Black should go for it. White will have a hard time coordinating their pieces.

feedback.text: After ...Qe7+, our queen is aligned with our king. Is it really safe?
